# fileURL

**Instance Property**

A URL property that specifies the location of the saved image.

## Declaration

```swift
unowned(unsafe) var fileURL: NSURL? { get set }
```

## Discussion

If `fileURL` is `nil`, then the file isn’t saved.
title: fileURL
